meta.title: The Geopolitics of America's Shale Revolution - Asia Panel: Arthur Herman and Anne Korin
meta.description: This conference examines how U.S. oil and natural gas exports reshaped the balance of global energy power, and features an Asia panel with Arthur Herman and Anne Korin.
